title: Magistrates' Courts (Njombe District Court) (Concurrent Jurisdiction over Wanging'ombe District) (Revocation) Order, 2020
title_en: Magistrates' Courts (Njombe District Court) (Concurrent Jurisdiction over Wanging'ombe District) (Revocation) Order, 2020

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This order may be cited as the Magistrates' Courts (Njombe District Court) (Concurrent Jurisdiction over Wanging'ombe District) (Revocation) Order, 2020.

provisions.title: Revocation of GN. No. 339 of 2012
provisions.content: The Magistrates' Courts (Njombe District Court) (Concurrent Jurisdiction over Wanging'ombe District) Order, 2012 is hereby revoked Ibrahim Hamis Juma, Chief of Justice History of this document 01 January 2021 this version Published Commenced 14 December 2020 Assented to Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all. Free Access to the law supports the rule of law and access to justice. TanzLII partners with African Legal Information Institute and Laws.Africa , who provide it with technical support.
